name: HACK Crimes Online
overview: The season initially focuses on Shakti's induction in the cybercrime unit alongside Jigar and Girish, and how they transform into an indomitable force solving extreme cybercrime cases under the tutelage of ACP Ashutosh.

trailers.title: Hack Crimes Online - Official Trailer | Riddhi Kumar & Vipul Gupta | 10 Nov | Amazon miniTV
